/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Galapoo.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Galapoo.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Galapoo.dir/src/jugador.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Galapoo.dir/src/bala.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Galapoo.dir/src/enemigo.cpp.o -o Galapoo  /usr/lib64/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-window.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib64/libsfml-system.so.2.6.2
